strict_win_deltas.delta: P2 places POST /items/import directly after GET /items, whereas P1 places it after the item-by-id route.
P2 computes the next id with a reduce that ignores non-finite existing ids, while P1 passes every existing id into Math.max, so a NaN or Infinity id can produce an unusable or colliding next id.
P2's reduce-based id scan avoids P1's spread of the entire items id array into Math.max, which can fail as the stored list grows large.
P2 compares the before and after parsed response bodies directly, while P1 changes the shared GET helper to add a text field solely to support one equality assertion.
